programs.title: The Fog
programs.desc: One hundred years after their ship was deliberately wrecked, the ghosts of the murdered seaman have returned to Antonio Bay to exact a ghastly vengeance.

programs.title: Edge Of Winter
programs.desc: Elliot Baker seizes the chance to develop a better relationship with his sons when his ex-wife, Karen, and her new husband take a vacation and leave the boys with him. What starts as a bonding opportunity turns into a nightmarish adventure when they get stranded in a deserted cabin near the lake as night falls and a snowstorm rages.

programs.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programs.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programs.title: Sheena (1984)
programs.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this exotic action-adventure.

programs.title: Life (2017)
programs.desc: A space crew's mission turns to one of primal fear after discovering a terrifying life form.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.
